items.title: Dummy Integration Overview
items.description: Developer dummy integration for Health Assistant, the self-hosted, open-source health records platform. Simulates OAuth flows, data pulling, and webhook pushing to test the integration engine without real API credentials.

items.title: Testing Scenarios
items.description: Testing scenarios for the Dev Dummy integration in Health Assistant. Trigger config-flow rejections, Celery sync failures, and rate-limit handling to validate the integration engine.

items.title: Troubleshooting
items.description: Troubleshooting the Dev Dummy integration in Health Assistant. Diagnose missing fake biomarker data, verify Celery sync tasks, and trigger manual integration syncs via the REST API.
